description: PR reviewer with the repository checked out: reads the diff AND explores the surrounding code with tools (read files, search, run read-only commands) before concluding. Emits a freeform review with MUST FIX / CONSIDER marker blocks that `darkmux pr-review render` resolves to inline pull-request comments. Deliberately has NO output_schema: a grammar-constrained output combined with tools makes the model skip tool-calling and fabricate (verified 2026-07-04) — the freeform marker contract is the tool-compatible replacement.

feedback_templates.cycle_suspected: [darkmux-runtime] You've called `{tool_name}` {count} times in {window_size} turns with the same arguments. Narrow the scope of your review — you've examined enough. Commit to a verdict in your final message; further reads will not change the conclusion.
